  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CannonShotPenalty
    Represents a penalty that consists of a series of cannon shots.
    CrewPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain amount of crew.
    DaysPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain number of days.
    GoodsPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain amount of goods.
    Penalty
    Represents a generic penalty in the game.
    RegularPenalty
    Represents a regular penalty in the game, which can be a penalty for crew loss or losing goods on loss.
